summary: Incomplete deliverable: fixture files (fixtures/secrets-*.json) and bats test file referenced but missing. Workflow repeats verification pattern (lines ~80-150: expired/warning/ok) instead of helper function. Security: actions/checkout@v4 not SHA-pinned; actionlint installed but never run on workflow. Script solid (set -euo, cleanup trap, error handling) but hardcoded expected values duplicated in workflow assertion steps + test harness.
